rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Abnormal LSASS Process Access and Injection (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Abnormal LSASS Process Access and Injection (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: c62c85ad-bbe7-4937-b77a-2cc984a1449d
status: experimental
description: Detects suspicious cross-process events where LSASS is accessed. Part
  of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/lsass-memory/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.credential_access
- attack.t1003.001
logsource:
  category: process_access
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    SourceImage|endswith:
    - \powershell.exe
    - \taskmgr.exe
    - \rundll32.exe
    - \procdump.exe
    - \procexp.exe
    TargetImage|endswith: \lsass.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
